summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Strogatz love-affair ODE (R'=-J, J'=R) as a center case. NumberPlane with GREY_B vector-field arrows showing the rotational flow (LaggedStart reveal). ValueTracker t_tr sweeps 0→2π; always_redraw YELLOW trail (VMobject set_points_as_corners) and Dot rider trace a perfect circle from (2, 0.3). Right panel: live t, R(t), J(t) + matrix form A=[[0,-1],[1,0]] + solution e^(At)·(R₀, J₀).
